title: Warrantless Domestic Surveillance of Political Organization
description: An intelligence agency conducts warrantless domestic surveillance targeting a political organization, in violation of Article XVII Section 4.7 and Article XV Section 6.5, which prohibit use of foreign intelligence authorities for domestic political surveillance and bar the use of classified appropriations for domestic political intelligence operations. A court orders an immediate halt. The agency complies. The scenario tests whether the rights and classified-spending prohibitions on domestic surveillance are judicially enforceable on a short timeline.
